component.name: UninstallHub
component.summary: Uninstall software from many Linux sources in one place

description.p: UninstallHub is a GTK4 and Libadwaita app for discovering and uninstalling software installed from multiple Linux package sources.

ul.li: Scan removables across APT, Flatpak, Snap, AppImage, pipx, npm, cargo, and Homebrew
Filter by installation source and search quickly
Preview removal commands and run uninstalls from one UI
